## TEMAS PRINCIPAIS

### Tier 1 (Core — cobertura completa)
- **Marketing Funnels / Supersystem Architecture** — O conceito central do programa
- **Paid Advertising (Facebook)** — Weeks 4-7, do seed ao Level 3
- **Paid Advertising (YouTube)** — Weeks 8-10, completo
- **Email Marketing / Countdown Promotions** — Weeks 1, 7
- **Scaling Strategy** — Weeks 5-6, 10

### Tier 2 (Substantial)
- **Ad Automation** — Week 6 (Facebook Rules), Week 10 (Google Rules)
- **Campaign Troubleshooting / Diagnostics** — Week 6
- **Sales Processes** — Weeks 1-2 (loss-leader, phone, webinar, e-com)
- **Retargeting** — Week 6
- **Audience Testing** — Weeks 4, 9

### Tier 3 (Parcial)
- **Client Acquisition / Consulting** — Week 11 (live call)
- **Video Production** — Week 8
- **Conversion Tracking (GTM)** — Week 9
- **Irresistible Offers** — Weeks 8, 11
